brief: Google Ads campaign for RMS Equipment Services (rmsservices.us). Business provides heavy equipment parts, repairs, maintenance, preventive maintenance. Key value props from site: specialized care for heavy equipment, expert technicians, fast & reliable repairs, preventive maintenance, state-of-the-art equipment, customer satisfaction guaranteed. CTAs: Get a Quote, Schedule Service/Appointments, Request Parts/Find Parts, Call 888-RMS-2023. Location: Mission, TX (Rio Grande Valley). Create multiple ad variants with different angles (downtime reduction, expert techs, parts availability, fast repairs).
